=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 10/25/02, Santa Ana Star Casino, Bernalillo, NM, 2CDR

Great sound. unknown lineage. 
"All Along The Watchtower" is incomplete as on the other circulating rec.

CD1

01. Intro + To Be Alone With You, 02. In The Summertime, 03. Tombstone Blues, 04. The End Of The Innocence, 05. Watching The River Flow, 06. Brown Sugar, 07. It Ain't Me, Babe, 08. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding), 09. Mr. Tambourine Man, 10. Drifter's Escape,

CD2

01. Tell Me That It Isn't True, 02. Old Man, 03. Honest With Me, 04. Blowin' In The Wind, 05. High Water (For Charley Patton), 06. Mutineer, 07. Bye And Bye, 08. Summer Days, 09. Knockin' On Heaven's Door, 10. All Along The Watchtower [ends early at 1:41]
